data.content:
Current status after running it end-to-end in your workspace:

1. I understood the build/run wiring.
2. I built the server + bundled WebUI successfully.
3. Tests currently fail at compile time (existing code issue).
4. I ran the server; it starts, serves WebUI, then crashes on this macOS environment due KCEF/JCEF native crash.

What I verified

- Server module bundles WebUI through the download task in [server/build.gradle.kts](server/build.gradle.kts#L204).
- Fat jar packaging is defined in [server/build.gradle.kts](server/build.gradle.kts#L165).
- Dev run/test commands are documented in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#L76) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#L79).

Build results

- Success: server+webui artifact built.
- Output jar exists at [server/build](server/build) as Suwayomi-Server-v2.1.2078.jar.
- Important: default daemon memory was too low and caused daemon disappearance during Kotlin compile. Increasing Gradle JVM memory fixed that.

Command shape that worked for stable build:
- JAVA_HOME=$HOME/.jdks/temurin-21/Contents/Home
- ./gradlew --no-daemon --console=plain -Dorg.gradle.jvmargs='-Xms512m -Xmx2048m -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=1024m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8' :server:downloadWebUI :server:shadowJar

Test results

- Failed at test compilation, not runtime test assertions.
- Error points to [server/src/test/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/test/ApplicationTest.kt](server/src/test/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/test/ApplicationTest.kt#L160): databaseUp(db)
- Current function signature is parameterless at [server/src/main/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/server/database/DBManager.kt](server/src/main/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/server/database/DBManager.kt#L148), so test code is out of sync.

Run results (server + webui together)

- Server run reached Javalin startup and static WebUI serving:
- Listening on http://0.0.0.0:4567/
- SPA static files served for WEBUI
- Then process crashes with native SIGSEGV related to KCEF/JCEF after startup.
- KCEF init site is [server/src/main/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/server/ServerSetup.kt](server/src/main/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/server/ServerSetup.kt#L516).

So in this environment, run is partially successful (startup + webui served) but not stable because of the KCEF native crash.

I also saved repo notes in memory at /memories/repo/build-notes.md with the working JVM args and the two current blockers.

Next useful steps

1. I can patch the failing test call in [server/src/test/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/test/ApplicationTest.kt](server/src/test/kotlin/suwayomi/tachidesk/test/ApplicationTest.kt#L160) so tests compile again.
2. I can add a guarded startup flag to skip KCEF initialization on macOS/dev mode so server+WebUI stays up reliably.
3. I can do both and re-run build, tests, and runtime verification.
